# Deep Awwwards Investigation 2026 (Per Project)

Project-specific deep dive into current Awwwards winners that informed concept, art direction, and motion. Not the same as `benchmark-reference-board.md` (which is the curated final board); this is the **investigation log**.

Reference: `.claude/skills/award-website-os/references/60-deep-awwwards-investigation-2026.md` (if present), `64-awwwards-jury-and-scoring-master.md`, `65-soty-sotd-patterns-master.md`.
